title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. gracilenta
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. gracilenta, also known as Rosa dumetorum gracilenta or wild rose, is a subvariety of the Rosa dumetorum plant, a type of wild rose species native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. gracilenta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to promote wound healing and skin health.
